data.title: BluSky AI Inc. Announces Appointment of Mort Aaronson to Board of Directors
data.description: A seasoned executive and strategic advisor has recently been appointed to the Board of BluSky AI as the company progresses with its modular AI infrastructure platform and long-term growth plans. This move underscores BluSky AI's commitment to enhancing its leadership team to achieve its goals.

data.title: Mobix Labs Added to Russell Microcap Index, Expanding Investor Visibility
data.description: A company based in Irvine, California, Mobix Labs, has recently been included in the Russell Microcap Index. This inclusion is significant as it expands investor visibility for the company. The Russell Microcap Index is a market index that includes small-cap stocks. This development is expected to increase opportunities for investors to engage with Mobix Labs.

data.title: LTC Declares Its Monthly Common Stock Cash Dividend for the Third Quarter of 2026
data.description: LTC Properties Inc. (NYSE: LTC) based in Westlake Village, Calif., has declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.19 per common share for the third quarter of 2026. The distribution schedule is as follows: July 23, 2026 (Payment Date: July 31, 2026), August 21, 2026 (Payment Date: August 31, 2026), and September 22, 2026 (Payment Date: September 30, 2026). Investors holding common shares as of the stated Record Dates will receive the designated amount.

data.title: Attain Partners Named a 2026 WTOP News Top Workplace
data.description: Attain Partners in McLean, Virginia, has proudly been recognized as a 2026 WTOP News Top Workplace for its dedication to its people-first culture, mission-driven work, and commitment to fostering employee growth. This prestigious award is based on employee feedback, showcasing the firm's strong focus on creating a positive work environment. The recognition highlights Attain Partners' exceptional standards and commitment to supporting its employees in Washington.

data.title: See's Candies Sweetens Summer with Return of Fourth-Annual Lollypalooza
data.description: In celebration of July, See's Candies, a renowned California chocolatier and candy company, is offering an array of special promotions. Throughout the month, customers can enjoy exclusive discounts, create personalized gift sets, taste limited-time flavors, and await the unveiling of a new lollipop on July 20. This exciting event aims to enhance the summer experience for customers and will be taking place in San Francisco.

data.title: The 23rd Annual Globee® Awards for Cybersecurity Invite Product and Service Achievement Nominations Worldwide
data.description: The Globee® Awards, an organization that acknowledges accomplishments in cybersecurity products, services, platforms, technologies, and solutions at local, regional, and global levels, saw worldwide participation in their recent event held in San Francisco on July 1, 2026. The recognition of excellence in this sector underscores the importance of such achievements globally.

data.title: The Brothers That Just Do Gutters Helps Homeowners Gain Financial Freedom With Flexible Payment Options
data.description: Leading up to the peak summer home improvement season, a company based in Scottsdale, Arizona is emphasizing their cost-effective financing options. The Brothers That Just Do Gutters is assisting homeowners with affordable solutions as they gear up for summer storms and seasonal maintenance tasks. This initiative comes at a crucial time as families are looking to enhance their homes, with the company striving to provide the necessary support.

data.title: The Oliver Patch Project Announces United Therapeutics Corporation Named Visionary/Presenting Sponsor of National Patch Day 2026
data.description: A national initiative providing ongoing encouragement and support to children, teenagers, and young adults has been announced in Miami on June 30, 2026. The Oliver Patch Project revealed that United Therapeutics Corporation has been selected as the Visionary/Presenting Sponsor. This initiative aims to reach youth across the country and offer them guidance and assistance.

data.title: HyperStrong Closes The smarter E Europe 2026 with 15 Agreements Totaling Nearly 10GWh, Marking a New Phase of Global Expansion
data.description: In Munich on July 1, 2026, HyperStrong revealed its outcomes from The smarter E Europe 2026 event that took place from June 23-25 in Germany. This event marked the company's fourth consecutive year of attendance. During the three-day event, HyperStrong successfully concluded 15 agreements, solidifying its presence in the market.

data.title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Norwalk, Connecticut - EMCOR Group, Inc. shared that the Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per common share. Record date for the dividend is July 15, 2026, with the payment scheduled for July 31, 2026. EMCOR Group, Inc., listed on NYSE under ticker EME and part of the Fortune 500 as well as S&P 500, specializes in mechanical and electrical construction services, industrial and energy infrastructure, and building services.
